zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Heton於大約1358年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德林加姆時，她的父親Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham44歲，母親Lady Constance De Leybourne39歲。她於1372年之前與Robert de Ogle結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1416年10月12日享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Heton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Heton was born about 1358, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham, was 44 and her mother, Lady Constance De Leybourne, was 39. She married Robert de Ogle before 1372. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 October 1416, at the age of 59.

Elle a épousé Robert de Ogle avant 1372. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1416, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Heton(이)가 대략 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Constance De Leybourne(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1372년 이전 Robert de Ogle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 10월 12일 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Heton родилась около 1358 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alan de Heaton Lord of Ellingham было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Constance De Leybourne, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ogle перед 1372 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 октября 1416 г. в возрасте 59 лет.
